context.jobToBeDone: Help employees find approved policy answers with citations

hardGatesApplied.reason: No clear accountable owner for production AI outputs

executiveSummary: This internal policy Q&A assistant scores well on use-case fit, data handling, and security basics, but accountability for AI outputs is still shared across teams. Hard gate HG-09 caps the result at Production with Guards until a named owner is assigned. Treat this as an advisory checklist for the next engineering and governance conversation — not certification.

dimensionNarratives.narrative: Ownership is the binding constraint: without a single accountable owner for production answers, escalation paths and decision rights stay ambiguous even when tooling looks mature.
Evaluation coverage is good enough for a guarded rollout, but groundedness and regression gates should be tightened before any claim of full production readiness.
Reliability patterns exist, yet fallback and rollback drills should be rehearsed so a model or prompt regression does not strand employees mid-policy lookup.

risks.title: Unclear ownership of AI answers
risks.description: When ownership is shared, incorrect or outdated policy answers may lack a clear fixer, reviewer, and escalation path.

risks.title: Eval drift under content change
risks.description: Policy corpora change often; without stronger golden-set gates, groundedness can slip quietly after prompt or retrieval updates.

risks.title: Weak failover for model outages
risks.description: Employees may be left without a documented fallback when the model or retrieval path fails during peak policy questions.

remediationPlan.title: Name a single accountable owner
remediationPlan.description: Assign one role accountable for production AI outputs, with a named backup and an escalation path for disputed answers.

remediationPlan.title: Add human review for high-impact answers
remediationPlan.description: Route answers that change entitlements, leave, or safety-critical policies through a human review queue before they are treated as authoritative.

remediationPlan.title: Harden golden-set regression gates
remediationPlan.description: Expand fixtures for groundedness and schema validity; block prompt deploys that regress the suite.

remediationPlan.title: Document and drill fallbacks
remediationPlan.description: Publish a fallback path (search index or human helpdesk) and rehearse prompt/model rollback.

citations.title: Advisory assessments are not certifications
